project.name: Cubeage GitHub Infrastructure
project.summary: Cubeage organization-level GitHub Actions workflow templates and reusable iOS signing/build workflow surfaces.
goals: Provide reusable GitHub Actions workflow surfaces for Cubeage repositories.
Keep iOS signing/build workflow inputs, required secrets, runner labels, and build artifacts visible in Git.
Document the temporary-keychain security model used by Cubeage iOS builds.
nonGoals: Own individual Cubeage game or application source code.
Own Apple Developer accounts, signing secrets, provisioning profiles, or per-app release decisions.
Own the Kubernetes, Talos, or macOS runner infrastructure that provides the self-hosted runner labels.

owns.name: org-workflow-templates
owns.description: Reusable workflow templates exposed to Cubeage repositories through GitHub's organization template surface.

owns.name: ios-sign-and-build-workflow
owns.description: The reusable GitHub Actions workflow that signs, archives, exports, and uploads iOS IPA artifacts.

owns.name: ios-runner-usage-documentation
owns.description: Documentation of required runner labels, workflow inputs, secrets, outputs, and signing-asset cleanup behavior.

doesNotOwn: Consumer application code, tests, store metadata, deployment, or release decisions.
Apple Developer account membership, certificates, provisioning profiles, or app-specific signing secrets.
Self-hosted macOS runner cluster provisioning, scaling, patching, or incident response.
Sylphx Platform CI/admission policy outside this repository's public workflow surfaces.

publicSurfaces.name: iOS signing and build reusable workflow
iOS App Store workflow template metadata

allowedDependencies.surface: GitHub Action for IPA artifact upload
Central project manifest schema and standards

forbiddenCouplings: Do not add app-specific schemes, bundle identifiers, signing identities, or store-release policy to this shared workflow repository.
Do not store certificates, provisioning profiles, Apple credentials, or consumer repository secrets in this repository.
Do not make this repository depend on consumer application internals.
Do not treat runner cluster operations as repo-local workflow-template state.

delivery.deployPath: No application deployment. Reusable workflow changes become available to consumer repositories after merging to main.
delivery.productionProof: Workflow changes should be proven by workflow syntax validation and by a consumer repository invoking Cubeage/.github/.github/workflows/ios-sign-and-build.yml@main.

gaps.description: Add a required workflow syntax/security validation gate before declaring full doctrine adoption.
gaps.target: Before material reusable workflow changes become routine.

gaps.description: Link the self-hosted macOS runner ownership and capacity contract from its owning infrastructure repository or catalog.
